deviceUuidHint: Leave default unless you want to mimic your own device id
legacyPollIntervalSecHint: Only used for legacy/Aliyun telemetry. Range: 10-300 seconds.
legacyTelemetryTransportHint: MQTT push is experimental; polling is currently recommended.
storeDebugPayloadsHint: Stores lastPayload and lastProtoContent. Enable only for analysis.
aliyunMqttUseTlsHint: Activa si el puerto 1883 saliente esta bloqueado en tu red. Desactivado por defecto por compatibilidad.
